name: Aloo Matar Rasedaar
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat ghee and sauté onion and garlic over medium heat until golden.
2. Add cloves, bay leaves, and cinnamon stick. Stir fry for 2 minutes.
3. Add garam masala, chili powder, turmeric, coriander powder, tomatoes, and salt.
4. Mix well. Cook until the tomatoes are soft.
5. Add potatoes and peas. Pour in water and bring to a boil.
6. Lower heat, cover the pan, and simmer gently for 15 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
7. Garnish with cilantro leaves and serve hot.
